blocked_actions: No WearGait-only T3 model screen from this audit.
No preregistration, LOOCV, lockbox, or canonical update from the T1-to-T3 scaffold.
No true T1, item, domain, or residual labels as production features.
No calibration, variance rescaling, sample weighting, tail weighting, or residual smoothing retry.
No gated-dataset loader scaffold before credentials and row-level schema exist.
decision.next_action: Submit/complete PPMI-Verily access, then run only a read-only schema probe after approval.

external_route_prioritization.policy: Scoring is for route prioritization only. It cannot authorize download, scaffold, preregistration, or model runs for gated routes.

top_routes.access_status: PPMI DUA/application required; no local credentials configured
top_routes.first_allowed_action: complete access request, then read-only schema probe after approval
top_routes.name: PPMI / Verily Study Watch
top_routes.verdict: Priority gated direct external T3 route. Kimi advised documenting it and waiting for user PPMI DUA/account action before building a probe scaffold; do not launch a remote job without credentials.

top_routes.access_status: C-Path 3DT Stage 2 membership or WATCH-PD Steering Committee proposal required; no local access or schema; C-Path Integrated Parkinson's Database does not include DHT data
top_routes.first_allowed_action: complete access request, then read-only schema probe after approval
top_routes.name: WATCH-PD
top_routes.verdict: Direct and protocol-relevant external T3 route, but request-gated and schema-hidden. Add to access queue only; do not create a scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run until C-Path 3DT membership or WATCH-PD Steering Committee approval provides row-level sensor files, labels, and schema. PPMI remains higher priority because it is larger and already has a Verily/MDS-UPDRS publication trail.

top_routes.access_status: RDSRC request-gated; no local access or schema; data release fees may apply
top_routes.first_allowed_action: complete access request, then read-only schema probe after approval
top_routes.name: Personalized Parkinson Project / PD Virtual Motor Exam
top_routes.verdict: Strong gated Verily-watch external route and useful peer to PPMI/Verily, but not public or locally approved. Do not create a scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run until RDSRC access is approved and row-level sensor/label schema is available.

top_routes.access_status: request-gated through authors/CNS; related CNS Sensors 2022 article states raw data available from authors on request
top_routes.first_allowed_action: complete access request, then read-only schema probe after approval
top_routes.name: CNS Portugal / Lobo IS2022 AX3 gait
top_routes.verdict: Direct request-gated T3 external route with wrist+lower-back AX3 and structured 10 m walk. Do not scaffold before schema and access are confirmed. Treat as external-validity evidence only; not an internal WearGait-PD ceiling-breaker.

top_routes.access_status: request-gated via Newcastle / data available on request; no local agreement or files
top_routes.first_allowed_action: complete access request, then read-only schema probe after approval
top_routes.name: ICICLE-PD / ICICLE-GAIT
top_routes.verdict: Direct longitudinal external T3 route with clinician MDS-UPDRS Part III labels, but request-gated and lower-back rather than wrist-native. Document and pursue access only; do not create a scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run until files and schema are available.

top_routes.first_allowed_action: complete access request, then read-only schema probe after approval
top_routes.name: MJFF Levodopa Response / Hssayeni
top_routes.verdict: Larger direct external wearable UPDRS-III route, but blocked until DUA approval.

top_routes.first_allowed_action: no compute; retain as documented external-validity evidence
top_routes.name: FoG-STAR
top_routes.verdict: Direct public small-N T3 external route; iter38 Stage-1 augmentation screen failed and iter39 zero-shot showed partial clinical+wrist external validity only.

top_routes.access_status: public Radboud WebDAV / DOI route; metadata, clinical CSV, and prepared per-subject parquet files are directly downloadable
top_routes.first_allowed_action: no compute; retain as documented external-validity evidence
top_routes.name: Parkinson@Home arm-swing validation
top_routes.verdict: Public direct T3 external route, but iter53 stopped before scoring because the pre-registered feature-readability hard stop retained only 18 valid OFF PD subjects versus the minimum of 20. No zero-shot, within-dataset LOOCV, or OFF/ON response metric exists; no internal WearGait-PD T1/T3 canonical can change. Do not rerun under the same preregistration; any shorter-window or fallback policy requires a fresh preregistration and remains external-validity-only.

top_routes.first_allowed_action: no compute; retain as documented external-validity evidence
top_routes.name: COPS
top_routes.verdict: Direct public T3 external route; iter49 zero-shot is complete. Wrist-only WearGait-to-COPS transfer is null, clinical+wrist transfer is partial, COPS-only LOOCV sanity is modest, and no internal canonical T3 change is allowed from this external result.

top_routes.access_status: public via Kaggle competition files and Zenodo archived competition dataset; iter51 full public raw-data run completed on remote
top_routes.first_allowed_action: no compute; retain as documented external-validity evidence
top_routes.name: TLVMC / DeFOG Parkinson's Freezing of Gait Prediction
top_routes.verdict: Direct public T3 external route; iter51 zero-shot is complete. WearGait lower-back magnitude features transfer weakly but positively to OFF-state DeFOG, wrist-to-lumbar stress transfer is near-null, DeFOG-only LOSO sanity is modest, and no internal WearGait-PD T3 canonical change is allowed from this external result.

fresh_source_notes.finding: Query returned 60 PubMed hits, confirming the active literature has moved toward longitudinal/free-living digital motor endpoints and access-gated cohorts rather than small-N single-session estimator tuning.
fresh_source_notes.name: PubMed 2025-2026 wearable/IMU/smartwatch UPDRS query

fresh_source_notes.finding: Wrist Study Watch data at 100 Hz were linked to MDS-UPDRS Part III within 90 days; PPMI remains the highest-priority gated route for a future schema probe.
fresh_source_notes.name: PPMI / Verily Study Watch prodromal PD progression paper

fresh_source_notes.finding: Lower-back AX3 free-living gait with MDS-UPDRS Part III is a real direct T3 route, but it mostly covers gait/axial burden rather than the non-gait residual domains now limiting WearGait T3.
fresh_source_notes.name: ICICLE-GAIT federated learning paper

fresh_source_notes.finding: Public bilateral wrist accelerometry includes UPDRS-III OFF/ON CSVs; already tested as iter49 and remains external-validity evidence only.
fresh_source_notes.name: COPS Scientific Data 2026

t1_scaffold_diagnostic.guardrail: OOF-level scaffold is diagnostic only. Base OOF predictions for meta-training rows may have trained on the held-out meta subject, so this is not a valid lockbox or promotion gate.

interpretation: Saved T1 OOF predictions do not provide a detectable corrected-T3 scaffold beyond the current iter47 predictor.
True T1 has privileged bridge value, supporting target-decomposition analysis but not a deployable T3 feature.
reports.label: t1_iter12
